overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through downtown Los Santos. The character crosses multiple intersections, passes the iconic Maze Bank building, walks along tree-lined sidewalks, and observes urban traffic including sports cars and pedestrians. The setting features modern office towers, palm trees, and the Oriental Theater with its distinctive domed roof.

events.description: black sports car drives past on the right side of the frame
steps onto sidewalk passing newspaper vending machines and fire hydrant

agents.ego_description: crossing the multi-lane street toward the Maze Bank building

notable_agents.action: black sports car driving along the street
pedestrian crossing the street ahead of the camera

cylindrical high-rise residential building with balconies
tall palm trees lining the street median
red and blue newspaper boxes on the sidewalk corner
yellow fire hydrant next to concrete trash can

segments.scene_description: The character begins crossing a wide downtown intersection with the Maze Bank building prominent on the left. Palm trees line the street as vehicles pass by. The character reaches the sidewalk where newspaper vending machines and a yellow fire hydrant mark the corner.

pedestrian approaches from ahead and passes close by the camera

entered.detail: well-maintained green hedge running along the building facade
deciduous trees planted in sidewalk cutouts providing shade
black convertible sports car parked at the curb

segments.scene_description: Walking along a tree-lined sidewalk with a tall hedge wall on the right, the character passes parked vehicles and street furniture. The Maze Bank building recedes into the distance while the tall apartment tower becomes more prominent ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection with movie theater and tall residential tower

crossing the street toward the movie theater with domed roof

segments.scene_description: As the character approaches the intersection, a pedestrian passes by closely. The Oriental Theater with its distinctive domes becomes visible on the right. The character crosses the street toward the theater while the tall apartment tower dominates the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide multi-lane intersection with heavy traffic

events.description: white van and motorcycle pass by on the left side
sports cars and jeep waiting at the intersection ahead

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection while observing the traffic and surrounding buildings

entered.detail: tall skyscrapers visible in the hazy distance downtown

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the wide intersection, turning to view different angles of the city. Various vehicles including a black convertible and white jeep wait at the lights. The tall apartment tower shifts across the frame as the camera pans, and the distant skyline becomes visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk next to parking garage and white retaining wall

events.description: passing by pedestrians talking on cell phones
approaching the parking garage entrance with billboard above

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to the white wall and multi-level parking structure

tall white retaining wall with chain link fence on top
large advertisement billboard mounted above the street

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking along a sidewalk bordered by a white concrete wall and chain-link fence on the left, with a multi-level parking garage ahead. The Oriental Theater is now visible in the distance on the right, while pedestrians walk by in the opposite direction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling downtown district that shifts from the shadow of corporate skyscrapers toward the architectural landmarks of a city center. It begins with the character crossing a wide intersection beneath the towering Maze Bank building, passing palm trees and street fixtures like newspaper machines and a yellow fire hydrant. As the character moves along a tree-lined sidewalk bordered by a tall hedge, the Maze Bank building recedes to make way for a dominant apartment tower ahead. The scene then opens up as the character crosses another street, passing a pedestrian and revealing the distinctive domed roof of the Oriental Theater on the right. Finally, the camera pans across waiting traffic, including a black convertible and white jeep, before following the character past a white concrete wall and chain-link fence toward a multi-level parking garage.
